LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARY MYERS' NOTICE OF INTENTION TO MOVE FOR NEW TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE ORDER GRANTING SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS VACATED. MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
June Bashant, Esq., of Rouda Feder Tiegen & McGuinn, Tel. 415.398.5398, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Daniel Smith, Esq. (no card) appearing with co-counsel for Plaintiff and moving party.
Susan Zeme, Esq., of the Law Offices of Susan Zeme, Tel. 510.652.6895, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D and the court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARY MYERS' Notice Of Intention To Move For New Trial is Granted. The order granting summary judgment is vacated. Upon review of all papers filed by the parties, the court is of the view that there is a triable issue whether the EDD forms establish that plaintiff was not qualified to perform her job absent any disabling conditions that plaintiff may have suffered as a result of her termination. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
